text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital has a group dance<n>lesson today, so
I've come to see<n>how it's going.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Echo forth! Fanfare! ♪ Sprint on!<n>Towards the goal,
I race! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wooo woo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The two of us will soon see a future<n>full of shining
stars! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wowiewowiewowie! King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...You know, Digital, you need to do<n>more than
cheer along if you want to<n>improve your dancing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh! S-sorry! I wasn't thinking. Old<n>habits die hard!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Good grief. Well, you're up next. I'll<n>check your
performance myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! N-no way... You'll only soil your<n>precious
eyes watching me dance...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
All the more reason for me to inspect<n>you. I have
zero intention of letting<n>someone who has taken a
lesson<n>with moi give a lackluster<n>performance.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Gyah! King is looking out for me?!<n>O-omigosh! I-I-I
can't breathe!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! I'll learn the dance<n>properly and do you
proud on stage...<n>at a winning concert...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Even if it kills me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Show me your<n>determination!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes, ma'am! Hey, Trainer. What's<n>the best dance
to show off my<n>determination?
choice_data_list: Do the dance you're best at!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
R-right! I'll give that a shot! Cue the<n>music and...
hit it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Tra la la la la! Tra la la—huh?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Guh... If I keep struggling this much,<n>there's no
way I can show King my<n>determination...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No complaining! Instead, let's work<n>on your
trouble spots first!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! K-King! Ohh... keep it together,<n>Digitan!
Don't... smile! Not... yet!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Butbutbutbut... King is sooo nice... I<n>already feel
like... 2,000% blessed!<n>Guehuehue! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Fighting to restrain her urges, Agnes<n>Digital gets
through the group dance<n>lesson.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I-in that case, I'll do the same<n>choreography King
was just dancing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Echo forth! Fanfare! ♪ Sprint on!<n>Towards the goal,
I race! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hm?! O-oh, not too shabby...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What?! D-d-do you mean it?!<n>Omigosh... I can't
believe I just got a<n>compliment from King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A-anyway, shall we resume the<n>lesson? ...I won't
let myself be<n>one-upped.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh... King's put on her seriousface! I've got to film th—no! I'vegot to be serious. Gotta be serious!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The two of them are having a positive<n>effect on
each other, and the dance<n>lesson ends up being
very<n>productive!
